policy.duplicate_records: preserve because distinct physical copies cannot be ruled out
policy.external_metadata: use exact ISBN matches only; never replace a non-empty CLZ value without a manual, sourced override
policy.cover_metadata: prefer exact ISBN matches; otherwise require a strict title-author-year-publisher edition match and preserve provider provenance

overrides.reason: The same ISBN appears in a complete CLZ record and in an exact Open Library edition record.
The title and year align exactly with a library catalogue record that supplies the authors, publisher and series.
The library record matches the exact ISBN, title, publisher and year and supplies the author.
The Université Laval schoolbook catalogue matches the course numbers, publisher and year and supplies the three authors.
